Documentation.long_help: Stent-like deformation along a walked centerline segment. Port 0: vessel vtkPolyData; port 1: centerline polyline. Strict alignment uses perpendicular distance to the **stent segment axis** (walked window), not the full centerline graph. Inside the flat-ended cylinder slab, vertices move along point normals so distance to that segment axis becomes StentRadius. Points still within R of the segment but outside the flat slab are unchanged by the strict pass. StentAxisSampleSpacing densifies the internal stent axis polyline. Output: int AffectMaskArrayName (default StentPlacementAffectMask) 0 strict / -1 else; double GeodesicToZeroRegionArrayName (default StentGeodesicToZeroRegion) **weighted** mesh graph distance (edge weight = Euclidean length on the **input** surface, computed after strict classification and before deformation) to mask-0. Optional GeodesicSmoothInfluenceRange x and GeodesicSmoothPowerLambda lambda: for mask -1 with 0 < geodesic < x (same world-length units as edge weights), add S*(R-d)*n to the vertex only when StentRadius R is greater than perp distance d to the **full** port-1 centerline (d = that distance, n = outward surface point normal, S = (1 - g/x)^lambda); double GeodesicSmoothStrengthArrayName (default StentGeodesicSmoothStrength) stores S when moved in band, else 0 (1 on strict vertices). vtkDoubleArray DisplacementArrayName (default StentPlacementDisplacement, 3 components) stores total displacement final minus input (dx, dy, dz); magnitude = Euclidean norm.
Documentation.short_help: Strict stent slab + optional geodesic band smooth (weighted geodesic on input mesh).

InputProperty.name: Centerline
InputProperty.Documentation: Centerline polyline(s), same style as SHYX Vessel End Clipper port 1 (vtkLine / vtkPolyLine cells).

IntVectorProperty.name: AnchorCenterlinePointId
IntVectorProperty.label: Anchor Centerline Point Id
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Point id on the centerline mesh whose position is the stent center. Must lie on the line graph.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: StentLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Stent Length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Total arc length along the centerline used for the stent segment (world units).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: StentRadius
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Stent Radius
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Target perpendicular distance from the local centerline tangent (world units).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: StentAxisSampleSpacing
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Stent Axis Sample Spacing
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum arc length between consecutive samples on the internal stent axis polyline. Zero keeps only graph-walk vertices; a positive value subdivides each axis segment so the piecewise-linear axis used for closest-point queries is denser (often smoother deformation near bends).

IntVectorProperty.name: PreferInputPointNormals
IntVectorProperty.label: Prefer input point normals
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, use the input surface point-data Normals array if present; otherwise vtkPolyDataNormals is run on the surface (splitting off, consistency + auto-orient).

StringVectorProperty.name: CenterlineRadiusArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Centerline radius array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Point-data scalar array on port 1 (Centerline). After each interactive snap to a centerline vertex, StentRadius is set from this array at that point id (first component). Choose (None) to keep the radius from the widget only. Typical VMTK output: MaximumInscribedSphereRadius.

StringVectorProperty.name: AffectMaskArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Affect mask array name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of the vtkIntArray written on output point data: 0 for vertices moved in the strict flat-capped region, -1 for all others. Cleared or empty falls back to StentPlacementAffectMask.

StringVectorProperty.name: GeodesicToZeroRegionArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Geodesic to zero-region array name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of the vtkDoubleArray on output: for vertices with affect mask ≠ 0, shortest **weighted** path (edge weight = Euclidean length on the **input** surface coordinates) to the nearest vertex with mask 0; mask 0 stores 0. Computed after strict classification, before vertex displacement. Empty name falls back to StentGeodesicToZeroRegion. -1 if no seed or unreachable (e.g. no vtkPolys).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: GeodesicSmoothInfluenceRange
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Geodesic smooth influence range (world length)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Threshold x in **world length** (same units as weighted surface geodesic: sum of edge lengths on the strict-deformed mesh): mask -1 vertices with geodesic g in (0, x) and **R > d** (StentRadius vs perp distance d to full centerline) are displaced by S*(R-d)*n. Default 5.0 is a length on the surface, not an edge count; tune with mesh scale. Zero disables this band pass.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: GeodesicSmoothPowerLambda
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Geodesic smooth power lambda

StringVectorProperty.name: GeodesicSmoothStrengthArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Geodesic smooth strength array name

StringVectorProperty.name: DisplacementArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Displacement array name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: vtkDoubleArray on output point data with 3 components (dx, dy, dz): final vertex position minus input surface position after strict placement and optional geodesic band smooth. Vector magnitude is displacement length; direction is the normalized vector when magnitude > 0. Empty name falls back to StentPlacementDisplacement.
